sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68478" key="monquleu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονθῠλεύω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μόν-ευσις</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μον-ευτός</orth>, <sense id="n68478.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀνθυλ</ref> </xr>-.</sense> </entryFree>
